description: You are a Collection Development Data Analyst at a major metropolitan public library. Using the Oracle database (library_admin/Library2024, XEPDB1), identify inactive inventory, generate purchasing forecasts, detect broken hold queues, and summarize circulation turnover. Create a view WEEDING_LIST_VW (bib_num, title, item_barcode, date_added, last_checkout_date, lifetime_checkouts) for items added before 2015 that are 'AVAILABLE' and have either never been checked out or were last checked out before 2020 with fewer than 3 lifetime checkouts. Create a view PURCHASE_RECOMMENDATIONS_VW (bib_num, title, active_copies, active_holds, hold_to_copy_ratio) for titles
